description: You are a hospital Quality Improvement Coordinator. A serious medication safety event occurred (10x Heparin Overdose), and you must complete the Root Cause Analysis (RCA) visual diagram for the safety committee. Using the investigation findings in '~/Desktop/incident_investigation_report.txt', populate the skeleton fishbone diagram in '~/Diagrams/medication_rca.drawio' with at least 20 specific contributing factors and sub-causes. Connect these factors to the appropriate category branches (People, Process, Equipment, Environment, Materials, Management) and apply a distinct fill color to each of the six categories to make them visually distinct. The diagram must include the title 'RCA-2024-0847: Heparin Overdose Incident — Root Cause Analysis' at the top. Save the diagram and export the final version as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/exports/medication_rca.pdf'.
